items.name_cn:
💯Tech fabric backpack❣️
This DiorTravel Backpack is a refined and practical choice. Crafted from tech fabric and featuring a blue Reverse Jacquard pattern, it offers a fresh take on the iconic motif with a contrasting effect. The front is adorned with a "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo, and it includes a zippered compartment and external pocket for easy storage of daily essentials. It comes with adjustable straps, allowing it to be carried by hand, over one shoulder, or on both shoulders.
Size: 20×12×28cm
Model: 6108

Monogram college
The classic messenger bag!!!
A messenger bag, as the name implies, is the bag carried by mail carriers when delivering newspapers and letters. Bags similar to those carried by mail carriers are collectively referred to as messenger bags. When mentioning messenger bags, this one from Y must be on the list!
Size: 24x17x6.5cm
Model: 392737

items.name_cn:
💰
Niki's design is inspired by YSL's classic tuxedo, with a cool and casual overall style. The bag is made of oil wax calfskin, with natural wrinkled texture that exudes a vintage feel and is durable! The iconic metal logo has a vintage distressed texture, low-key and premium, as if silently telling the brand's fashion attitude!
Size: 18×12.5×5cm
Model: 828736

items.name_cn:
💰
🌸 CALYPSO_ Elephant Print Suede Chain Bag
Made of imported Italian lambskin, soft and delicate to the touch. Classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are all made of matte gold hardware. The bag uses a magnetic four-clasp closure at the opening, ensuring excellent sealing and security. There is a zippered inner pocket inside for placing a phone and valuables; aside from that, there are no extra inner pockets, making it free and easy to use!
Size: 28×22×12cm
Model: 777399 (Elephant Print)

items.name_cn:
💰
Y's 2024 Spring/Summer New Mini Tote
This mini tote is from the NEW SHAPE series! It uses new craftsmanship and smooth, soft calfskin. The leather is heat-pressed for a glossy, silky finish! The fan-shaped appearance and cut-out handle design make it stylish and exquisite! The bag features a versatile, avant-garde structure with two openings, allowing for both hand and crossbody/shoulder wear, perfectly adapting to any style you desire!
Model: 791069
Size: 29x19.5x10cm

items.name_cn:
💰
ys1 Jamie 4.3 large pochon Suede Shoulder Bag
The designer really understands what consumers need, doesn't they?
Many tote bag designs fail to balance aesthetics and practicality.
But! This tote does it!
It is lightweight, spacious, and elegant!
It is a practical tote with on-point design and a luxurious feel.
I think it looks better than the 22bag.
Is it okay to say that 😝
It is also a mommy bag that allows you to be elegant while taking care of your baby~
34×27×3cm
Model: 809824
